curatorNote:
Beeple's TIME magazine cover captured a distinct cultural moment: a digital-native artist collaborating with a legacy publication to reflect on the future. Created with Cinema 4D and OctaneRender, Beeple embedded his own design interface into the work with process and product collapsing into one.

Hivemind holds the Beeple Edition variant of the May 2021 cover. It fits our focus on works that sit at the crossroads of artistic integrity, technological innovation, and cultural relevance.
